name: 1'6"x2'6" Rope Braided Basket Weave Doormat Black/Brown/Cream - Threshold™: Outdoor Front Door Mat, High Pile
description:
Protect your floors and add an inviting feel to your entryway with the Rope Braided Basket Weave Doormat from Threshold™. This rectangular doormat is made from a lightweight material to help keep your space clean, while the latex backing helps prevent it from slipping or sliding. Featuring a rope braided basket weave pattern in a natural hue for extra style, the high-pile doormat easily blends in with any decor color palette.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
